scripts.build: npm run build -w @hookforge/shared && npm run build -w @hookforge/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @hookforge/shared && npm run typecheck -w @hookforge/web && npm run typecheck -w @hookforge/indexer && npm run typecheck -w @hookforge/ai-engine && npm run typecheck -w @hookforge/simulator
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run contracts:test
